summary.provenance: Graded against the template rules in force per promptVariant. summary-overlong reasons align 1:1 with the committed summary-policy analysis (harvest/summary-labels.json) intersected with the reviewer corpus (29 traces). finding-in-body is graded against reviewer.md 'Do not put actionable findings in the summary' (3 traces). Signals are NOT graded (harness/schema-era dependent, never prompt-requested). Verdict correctness spot-checked for internal consistency only — full code re-review out of scope.
